title: (MOE-trained) Full-Time Math Teacher (Primary Education)
description:
Are you passionate about teaching primary schoolmath and do you enjoy interacting with kids? Are you excited about the opportunity for career progression and growth, all while working in a supportive environment with a team of dedicated, dynamic and fun-loving teachers?

If so, then this is the perfect opportunity for you!

About Us:

Established in 2013, what sets Math Mavens apart from other tuition centres is our sole focus on Primary Mathematics education. Our team of teachers work together constantly to review and refine existing mathematical processes and methodology. We are proud to have developed a set of effective, efficient and elegant problem-solving strategies which students can apply confidently when approaching Mathematics questions.

What you'll do:

  • Implement the designated curriculum. (Max. 10 classes per week, 2 hours per class)
  • Provide support and ideas towards the planning and development of the curriculum.
  • Attend team meetings
  • Monitor the student's learning through prompt written and verbal feedback and grading of homework.
  • Provide parents with weekly feedback on lesson progress.
  • Provide follow-up make up sessions when students are not able to attend class due to official school events or sickness.
  • Provide coverage for teachers who are unable to take their assigned class due to unforeseen circumstances.
  • Perform all administrative and other duties as assigned.

Who you are:

  • Current or Ex-MOE Teacher
  • Enjoys teaching Math
  • Passionate about working with children
  • Strong team player
  • Energetic, dynamic individual

Remuneration and Supplemental Pay:

  • We will match your current MOE Pay
  • Starting from $5000 to $7000
  • + 13 Month Bonus
  • + Special Bonus
  • + Corporate insurance plan

Perks:

  • 6 weeks leave per year (2 weeks in June and 4 weeks in November/December)
  • Flexi-hours based on a 44 hour work week
  • Our centre has no classes on Sundays
  • Regular pedagogical and content training
  • Be part of a great team of colleagues

Schedule:

  • 5 day work week (4 weekdays + Saturday)

Work Location: In person

Location:

MM@Bukit Timah Branch

Blk 4, Queen's Road, #02-131, Singapore 260004

MM@Sixth Avenue Branch

1 Fifth Avenue, #02-09 Guthrie House, Singapore 268802

MM@Parkway Centre Branch

1 Marine Parade Central, #08-03 Parkway Centre, Singapore 449408

Apply now for a non-obligatory discussion!

postedCompany.description: We are a tuition centre with the sole objective of providing academic support in Mathematics for primary students. We are humbled by the immense trust and support from our parents as we strive to make a name for ourselves as a centre with a team of dedicated, personable NIE-trained FULL-TIME teachers and a unique curriculum.
postedCompany.name: MATH MAVENS PTE. LTD.
